subcodes.first_line: O kindred and wise relatives of His Majesty Kay Khusraw, who showed sovereignty and manifested fidelity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خویشان و پیوند ان هوشمند حضرت کیخسرو خسروی فرمود و وفاپروری نمود
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for the departed, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
